details: Paper 034 (10.3390/molecules15129354) explicitly lists compound 8 'Ethyl 2-benzamido-2-(naphthalen-2-ylamino)acetate' with Yield 62%, m.p. 210-212 °C (ether/hexane). Compound name, value range, units, property type, meas_calc=measured, and DOI all match. The CSV name uses synonym 'Ethyl 2-benzamido-2-(naphthalen-2-ylamino)acetate' while paper says '(2-naphthylamino)' — equivalent IUPAC variants.
Paper 023 (10.1134/S107042802211001X) shows compound 4h '1,1'-(Decane-1,10-diyl)bis{3-[(3,5-dimethyladamantan-1-yl)methyl]urea}' with Yield 0.263 g (94%), mp 99.6°C. Exact match.
Paper 092 (10.3390/60900784) shows compound 9a '2-[3-(4-phenyl-1-piperazinyl)propyl]-1-phenyl-1,2-dihydropyridazine-3,6-dione' Base obtained in 74% yield, m.p. 97-99°C (acetone). Exact match.
Paper 127 (10.1134/S1070428022100086) shows compound 2 '6-[(2-Hydroxybenzylidene)amino]-2-methylquinolin-4-ol' with Yield 0.20 g (72%), mp 326-327°C. Exact match.

Paper 181 (10.3389/fchem.2023.1303479) compound 1a '4-(2-benzylidenehydrazinyl)-2,10,14-trimethylpentadeca-2,9,13-trien-6-one' White solid; mp: 119°C-114°C. Paper does print the reversed range verbatim; recorded as is in value_raw with explanatory note. All fields verifiable.
Paper 090 (10.3390/70800681) compound 2p '3-(2-furanyl)-6-(4-nitrophenyl)-1,2,4-triazolo[3,4-b]-1,3,4-thiadiazole' Yield 59%, M.p. 304-306°C. Exact match.
Paper 129 (10.3390/70200252) compound 5a '3-Ethoxycarbonyl-2-benzyl isoquinolinium bromide' Yield 90%, mp = 132-34°C. Range shorthand for 132-134°C; recorded verbatim as 132-34°C.
Paper 117 (10.3390/molecules31040595) compound 15g, Yield 71%, pale yellow solid, mp 214-216 °C. Exact match.

Paper gomezayuso_2024 SI (10.3762/bjoc.20.154) compound 10a '1-Benzyl-N-cyclohexyl-6-oxo-3,4-diphenyl-1,4,5,6-tetrahydropyrazine-2-carboxamide' Pink solid (54%, 519 mg), M.p. = 206 - 207 °C (crystallized in iPrOH). Match.
Paper kim_2026 (10.1021/acsomega.5c13222) Section 4.2.6, '6-Fluoroquinolin-2(1H)-one (2f)' white solid, m.p. = 272-273 °C. Match.
Paper 2013_Zhou (10.1021/jm3014162) compound 14b '(3,5-Dichlorophenyl)-(2,4,6-trimethylphenyl)amine' obtained as a pale yellow solid (mp 99-100 °C). Match.

Paper 020 (10.3390/molecules29122942) compound 60 'Methyl 2'-chloro-4'-((((1-(2,4,6-trioxohexahydropyrimidin-5-yl)ethylidene)amino)oxy)methyl)benzoate', R f = 0.20 (AcOEt), m.p. > 250 °C. Relation '>' correctly recorded. Match.
Paper yanovich_2024 (10.3762/bjoc.20.48) compound 2e '(E)-7-Benzyl-9-benzylidene-4-(4-(tert-butyl)phenyl)-1-oxa-7-azaspiro[4.4]non-3-ene-2,6,8-trione' White solid, mp 176.1-177.7 °C. Match.

Paper 005 (10.1002/cmdc.202500751) compound 9a 'Diphenyl(6-Phenyl-6,6a,7,11b-Tetrahydro-5H-Indeno[2,1-c]Quinolin-4-Yl)Phosphine Oxide' obtained 3.83 g (77%) as a white solid, mp 232-234°C (ethyl acetate/hexane). Match.
Paper 2019_Marek (10.3762/bjoc.15.242) compound 26 'Diphenyl(((1R,2S,5R)-δ-pinen-4-yl)methyl)phosphine oxide' to give 26 (0.547 g, 78%), mp 62-66 °C. Match.

Paper 095 (10.3390/60300267) compound 4: 'Schiff's base of 3-amino-2-[1'-(4-methyl phenyl sulphonamido)-1'-(iso-propyl)methyl]-quinazolin-4-(3H)-one' Prepared from 3e and 4-chlorobenzaldehyde; pale brown crystals (69%); m.p. 160°C. Constructed compound name matches the named entity in the paper.
Paper 020 (10.3390/molecules29122942) compound 7 '2-(But-3-yn-1-yloxy)isoindoline-1,3-dione' White solid (473 mg, 60%). R f = 0.45 (AcOEt), m.p. 104 °C. Match.

Paper 062 (10.3390/ijms12042448) Table 5 row 40 lists '7-me-1-octanol' with experimental BP 206.0°C. Compilation of literature/experimental values; meas_calc=measured is consistent with v2.1 rule allowing review-paper compilations to be labeled measured.
Paper 068 (10.3390/molecules31050844) compound 6e '6-fluoro-5-(4-butylpiperazin-1-yl)-1H-benzo[d]imidazole' (note: section 3.1.6 mentioned), Yield 0.93 g, 89.8%, M.P.: 140-142 °C. Match.
Paper 049 (10.3390/80500444) compound 2 '3β-acetoxy-16-[bis(methylthio)methylene]androst-5-en-17-one' to furnish 2 (0.8165 g, 62%) as yellow needles, mp: 165.7-168.0 °C. Match.

Paper 028 (10.3390/ijms242216359) compound 5f Yield 88 mg (27%); white powder; mp: 260-262 °C. The very long compound name in the CSV ('Ethyl rac-... -dispiro[imidazo[4,5-e]thiazolo[3,2-b][1,2,4]triazine-6,3'-pyrrolidine-2',3''-indoline]-4'-carboxylate') matches the paper's compound 5f IUPAC name. Match.

Paper 138 (10.3390/70700554) compound 6c '1,4-Di(4-methoxyphenyl)-N-ethoxymethylene-2-amino-3-cyanopyrrole' Yield: 73%; mp: 117-18°C. Range shorthand 117-18 = 117-118; recorded as 117-118 °C in value_raw. Match.

Paper gomezayuso_2024 (10.3762/bjoc.20.154) compound 9g, White solid (69%, 731 mg) crystallized in iPrOH, M.p. = 203-204 °C. The CSV compound name uses 'tetrahydropyrrolo[1,2-a]pyrazine' which matches the paper's IUPAC name for 9g. Match.

Paper 015 (10.3390/molecules31040696) PB01 '(1S,2S)-2-((5-Fluoro-2-(5-fluoro-1H-pyrrolo[2,3-b]pyridin-3-yl)pyrimidin-4-yl)amino)cyclohexan-1-ol' white solid PB01 (252 mg, 0.73 mmol, yield 73%) melting point of 207-209 °C. Match.
Paper kim_2026 (10.1021/acsomega.5c13222) Section 4.2.11 '7-Fluoroquinolin-2(1H)-one (2k)' white solid, mp = 260-272 °C. The wide range is recorded verbatim. Match.
